description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.10 Docker image. Define variables ARTIFACTS_DIR, BIN_NAME, GO_PROJECT and two stages: build and test. Include a before_script that creates ${GOPATH}/src/${GO_PROJECT} and ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR} directories, installs dep via curl, copies the project files, runs go get github.com/golang/mock/gomock, installs mockgen, gets github.com/satori/go.uuid, creates a mock_server directory, runs go generate ./..., installs the mock server binary, and returns to the project root. Add a build-my-project job in the build stage that runs go build -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${BIN_NAME} and saves the ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} directory as an artifact. Add a test-my-project job in the test stage that runs go test -v -race -cover -coverprofile=coverage.txt -tags="unit integration" -covermode=atomic and then uploads coverage with bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash). No special rules, caches, or deployment targets.
